name: Meatloaf Second Time Around Ideas
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the meatloaf and add it to soups for extra flavor and texture.
2. Slice the meatloaf thinly, layer on bread, top with salsa and thin slices of Monterey Jack cheese, then broil until heated through.
3. Julienne some peppers, onions, and mushrooms, and sauté them in a pan. Julienne leftover meatloaf and sauté alongside the vegetables to reheat the meat.
